candidate.digestRecipe: Hash the exact bytes of every sorted path recorded in HGI-203-content-manifest.txt; then hash that retained manifest. The base commit plus manifest digest identifies the dirty candidate without a circular self-hash.

packageDigests.provenance: Exact locked workspace dependency graph bytes.

attempt.provenance: One final sequential execution of all nine canonical local TaxKit release-readiness checks against the file-URL-safe, diagnostic-prefix-safe cross-platform home-redaction candidate; all journey evidence pointers and results bind to this bounded accepted-attempt summary.
attempt.postcondition: Every ordered local check completed once with a true zero exit and retained sanitized detail.
attempt.recovery: Use the immutable bounded attempt summary, receipt and verified local detail paths for review; do not rerun for presentation.
attempt.resumeTrigger: Independent acceptance may change lifecycle without altering this attempt; a materially new candidate identity requires a new attempt.
attempt.rollback: Revert the candidate semantic commit while retaining this attempt receipt and all failed or accepted evidence.
attempt.limitation: This local attempt does not establish registry, release, deployment, provider, deployed SSR or public-site state.
attempt.nonClaim: No package was published and no tag, release, deployment or provider mutation was performed.
